Created attachment 172894
Light rework of 2.2 with attempt to clarify Intel support of amd64 architecture and 2 minor spelling fixes

I reworked the beginning of section 2.2 in order to clarify Intel's support of the amd64 architecture. Also added a link to the FreeBSD download page, and fixed two minor spelling mistakes later in the chapter.
